(2, 2).title: The Guesthold
(2, 2).description: A low-ceilinged common space warmed by a channel of vented heat running beneath the floor. Stone benches line two walls, each with a woven fiber mat and a shallow indent for a rolled sleeping mat. A carved stone counter divides the room. The smell is warm mineral and something faintly resinous — incense, or sealing compound.

props.name: Stone Basin
props.description: A low stone basin fed by a thin trickle from a wall spout. The water is clear and slightly warm. You could DRINK from it.
props.idle_message: A low stone basin trickles quietly near the entrance.
props.discovery_message: a trickling stone basin near the entrance!
props.announce: A low stone basin trickles quietly near the entrance.

props.name: Notice Board
props.description: A flat stone panel fixed to the wall near the entrance, its face smoothed. Two notes in different hands are pinned to it.
props.idle_message: A flat notice panel is fixed to the wall.
props.discovery_message: a notice panel fixed to the wall!
props.announce: A flat notice panel is fixed to the wall.
notes: [Golemite symbols. Three trade-tongue words marked in a different hand: 'pool. closed. elder.']
Beds free if you behave. Strange city. Warm though. — M.

props.name: Guesthold Entrance
props.description: A broad doorway leads back out to the Ecumerium arcade.
props.idle_message: The entrance to the Guesthold leads back to the arcade.
props.discovery_message: the entrance leading back to the arcade!
props.announce: The entrance to the Guesthold leads back to the arcade.

(2, 1).title: The Guesthold — Sleeping Quarters
(2, 1).description: A long alcove fitted with four sleeping niches cut directly into the stone, each with a shallow mat-channel and a small carved ledge at head height. The ceiling is lower here; the walls have been smoothed and sealed with a pale grey compound that still carries faint tool marks. Names and tally marks scratched at one niche — the record of someone's stay, counted out in nights.

props.name: Ledge Niche
props.description: A narrow recess cut into the stone wall at shoulder height, masked by a fitted stone panel. Whatever was left here has been here for some time.
props.idle_message: A stone panel covers a recess in the wall.
props.discovery_message: a recess in the wall, hidden behind a fitted stone panel!
props.announce: A stone panel covers a recess in the wall.

(3, 2).title: The Guesthold — Proprietor's Corner
(3, 2).description: A recessed alcove behind the main counter, its walls lined with stone shelves and a broad work surface worn level by long use. Small carved bins hold supplies in ordered rows. A board of hooks on one wall holds iron ring loops, the kind used to secure provisions. The back wall bears a shallow carved relief: a figure at rest, one hand open — cut with more care than the utilitarian surroundings might suggest.

props.name: A Traveller's Record
props.description: A slim journal in a plain leather cover, its spine well worn. The handwriting inside is small and cramped.
props.announce: A slim leather-bound journal rests here.
props.text: Day twelve in Grondia. The stone holds heat differently here than I expected — not cold like a cave, but warm, almost like sleeping near an oven that never goes out. One of the Golemites brought food without being asked — mineral broth, which is precisely what it sounds like, but warming. The city runs on an unspoken schedule. Movement, then stillness. Work, then gathering. No bells — they seem to know. I asked my host how. He touched his chest and said nothing I could translate. The mineral pools are closed. Posted at every passage leading to them: flat stone slabs with the same inscription. Jambo translated it as 'passage withdrawn pending restoration.' No one will say more than that.

props.name: Stone Counter Shelf
props.description: A broad stone shelf behind the counter, its surface worn flat by years of use. Several items rest on it within reach.
props.idle_message: A broad stone shelf stands behind the counter.
props.discovery_message: a broad stone shelf behind the counter!
props.announce: A broad stone shelf stands behind the counter.
